name: core_diabetes_ada_aace
description: Core ADA/AACE diabetes-care retrieval keywords for diagnosis, glycemic targets, pharmacologic treatment, cardiometabolic disease, obesity, MASLD/MASH, and diabetes technology.

type 1 diabetes type 2 diabetes prediabetes autoimmune diabetes autoantibodies C-peptide LADA

CGM BGM SMBG time in range TIR time below range TBR time above range TAR GMI
